name: Kahlua Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over simmering water.
2. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
3. Add egg yolks one at a time, stirring constantly until thoroughly blended.
4. Mix in Kahlua and return to double boiler for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Pour mixture into bowl of electric mixer and beat in butter, one tablespoon at a time.
6. Continue beating until mixture is light and airy.
7. Cover and refrigerate for 4 to 5 hours or overnight.
8. Form the mixture into 3/4 inch balls.
9. Roll in cocoa or nuts.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Can be frozen.
